summary.label: P3-forgetting
summary.note_underpowered: N=5 — confidence intervals are wide; report effect size + direction only

cold_retrieval_analysis.honest_note: TF-IDF has no time-decay component. Cold Eblets are retrieved with equal efficiency to recent ones for equivalent content queries. Any rank/score differences reflect CONTENT relevance, not temporal decay. The biological forgetting curve does NOT have a native analog in TF-IDF.

confidence: LOW (N=5; content-similarity drives TF-IDF, not temporal decay; architectural fact)
architectural_note: TF-IDF has no time-decay component. Cold Eblets are retrieved with equal efficiency to recent ones for equivalent content queries. Any rank/score differences reflect CONTENT relevance, not temporal decay. The biological forgetting curve does NOT have a native analog in TF-IDF.
